---
title: "MiamiMarlins"
author: "Aidan Stewart"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)

# I did the github installation from Bill Petti
library(baseballr)
library(ggforce)
library(tidyverse)
library(lubridate)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(glmnet)
library(caret)
library(pROC)

set.seed(101)
```

```{r}

## This fg_batter_leaders function is from the baseballr library
## Description: this function allows you to scrape all leaderboard
## statistics (basic and advanced) from FanGraphs.com

# 2023 season
fg_2023 <- fg_batter_leaders(
  startseason = 2023,
  endseason   = 2023,
  pos         = "all",   
  stats       = "bat",   
  qual        = "200"
)

# 2024 season
fg_2024 <- fg_batter_leaders(
  startseason = 2024,
  endseason   = 2024,
  pos         = "all",   
  stats       = "bat",   
  qual        = "200"
)

# 2025 season
fg_2025 <- fg_batter_leaders(
  startseason = 2025,
  endseason   = 2025,
  pos         = "all",
  stats       = "bat",
  qual        = "200"
)

```

```{r}

### EDA

# Removing the columns with NA values

fg_2023_clean <- fg_2023[, colSums(is.na(fg_2023)) == 0]
fg_2024_clean <- fg_2024[, colSums(is.na(fg_2024)) == 0]
fg_2025_clean <- fg_2025[, colSums(is.na(fg_2025)) == 0]


# Plotting WAR vs Plate Appearences
war_vs_pa_scatter <- ggplot(data = fg_2024_clean, aes(PA, WAR)) +
  geom_point() +
  theme_bw()
#plot(war_vs_pa_scatter)


# Creating delta_war: Adding the WAR column from the next year
# to the previous year's dataset as next_WAR and then calculating
# the change in WAR
fg_2023_final <- fg_2023_clean %>% left_join(
  fg_2024_clean %>% select(playerid, WAR),
  by = "playerid",
  suffix = c("", "_next")
)

fg_2023_final <- fg_2023_final %>% 
  filter(!is.na(WAR_next)) %>%
  mutate(delta_WAR = WAR_next - WAR)
  

fg_2024_final <- fg_2024_clean %>% left_join(
  fg_2025_clean %>% select(playerid, WAR),
  by = "playerid",
  suffix = c("", "_next")
)

fg_2024_final <- fg_2024_final %>% 
  filter(!is.na(WAR_next)) %>%
  mutate(delta_WAR = WAR_next - WAR)



# Which columns to keep and why

# ID columns, (not modeled)
id_cols <- c(
  "playerid",
  "PlayerName"
)

age_col <- c(
  "Age"
)

# Playing time variables
pt_vars <- c(
  "PA",
  "G"
)

# Plate discipline vars
discipline_vars <- c(
  "BB_pct",
  "K_pct",
  "BB_K",
  "O-Swing_pct",
  "Z-Swing_pct",
  "Swing_pct",
  "O-Contact_pct",
  "Z-Contact_pct",
  "Contact_pct",
  "Zone_pct",
  "F-Strike_pct",
  "SwStr_pct",
  "CStr_pct",
  "C+SwStr_pct"
)

# Batted Ball Vars
batted_ball_vars <- c(
  "GB_pct",
  "FB_pct",
  "LD_pct",
  "IFFB_pct",
  "GB_FB"
)

# Directional Tendencies
direction_vars <- c(
  "Pull_pct",
  "Cent_pct",
  "Oppo_pct"
)

# Contact Quality Variables
contact_quality_vars <- c(
  "Hard_pct",
  "Med_pct",
  "Soft_pct",
  "Barrel_pct",
  "HardHit_pct",
  "EV",
  "LA",
  "maxEV"
)

# Outcome Variables
results_vars <- c(
  "AVG",
  "OBP",
  "SLG",
  "ISO",
  "BABIP",
  "WAR"
)

# Expected Variables
expected_vars <- c(
  "xwOBA",
  "xAVG",
  "xSLG"
)

# + Variables
plus_vars <- c(
  "wRC_plus",
  "AVG+",
  "OBP+",
  "SLG+",
  "ISO+",
  "BABIP+"
)


# Final Predictor List
predictor_vars <- c(
  age_col,
  pt_vars,
  discipline_vars,
  batted_ball_vars,
  direction_vars,
  contact_quality_vars,
  results_vars,
  expected_vars,
  plus_vars
)


```

```{r}

# Trying logistic regression
# Using the fg_202x_final datasets
fg_2023_logit <- fg_2023_final %>%
  mutate(did_breakout = as.integer(delta_WAR >= 2))

fg_2024_logit <- fg_2024_final %>%
  mutate(did_breakout = as.integer(delta_WAR >= 2))

did_breakout_plot <- ggplot(fg_2023_logit, aes(x = factor(did_breakout))) +
  geom_bar(fill = "steelblue", color = "black") +
  geom_text(
    stat = "count",
    aes(label = ..count..),
    vjust = .5,
    size = 5
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Breakout Indicator Distribution",
    x = "did_breakout (0 = No, 1 = Yes)",
    y = "Count"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

model_df_2023 <- fg_2023_logit %>%
  select(
    playerid,
    PlayerName,
    did_breakout,
    any_of(predictor_vars)
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    did_breakout = factor(did_breakout, levels = c(0, 1))
  )



```

```{r}

# Training predictors
x_train <- model_df_2023 %>%
  select(-did_breakout, -any_of(id_cols))

y_train <- model_df_2023$did_breakout

# Convert to matrix
x_train_mat <- as.matrix(x_train)
y_train_vec <- as.numeric(as.character(y_train))

logit_enet <- cv.glmnet(
  x = x_train_mat,
  y = y_train_vec,
  family = "binomial",
  alpha = 0.5,
  nfolds = 5,
  standardize = TRUE,
  type.measure = "auc"
)

logit_enet$lambda.min
logit_enet$lambda.1se

```

```{r}

# 1. Build modeling table
model_df_2024 <- fg_2024_logit %>%
  select(playerid, PlayerName, did_breakout, any_of(predictor_vars))

# 2. Impute using TRAIN medians
train_medians <- apply(x_train, 2, median, na.rm = TRUE)

model_df_2024 <- model_df_2024 %>%
  mutate(
    across(
      names(train_medians),
      ~ ifelse(is.na(.x), train_medians[cur_column()], .x)
    )
  )

# 3. Create test matrix
x_test <- model_df_2024 %>%
  select(-did_breakout, -playerid, -PlayerName)

x_test_mat <- as.matrix(x_test)

stopifnot(identical(colnames(x_test_mat), colnames(x_train_mat)))


pred_prob_2024 <- as.numeric(
  predict(
    logit_enet,
    newx = x_test_mat,
    s = "lambda.min",
    type = "response"
  )
)

model_df_2024$pred_prob <- pred_prob_2024


roc_2024 <- roc(
  response = model_df_2024$did_breakout,
  predictor = model_df_2024$pred_prob
)

auc(roc_2024)

```

```{r}


threshold <- quantile(model_df_2024$pred_prob, 0.80)


model_df_2024 <- model_df_2024 %>%
  mutate(pred_class = ifelse(pred_prob >= threshold, 1, 0))

caret::confusionMatrix(
  factor(model_df_2024$pred_class),
  factor(model_df_2024$did_breakout)
)



```

```{r}

# Predicting 2025 breakout players
score_2025 <- fg_2025_clean %>%
  select(playerid, PlayerName, any_of(colnames(x_train)))


score_2025 <- score_2025 %>%
  mutate(
    across(
      names(train_medians),
      ~ ifelse(is.na(.x), train_medians[cur_column()], .x)
    )
  )

x_2025_mat <- as.matrix(
  score_2025 %>% select(-playerid, -PlayerName)
)

stopifnot(identical(colnames(x_2025_mat), colnames(x_train_mat)))


score_2025$breakout_prob <- as.numeric(
  predict(
    logit_enet,
    newx = x_2025_mat,
    s = "lambda.min",
    type = "response"
  )
)

breakout_board_2025 <- score_2025 %>%
  arrange(desc(breakout_prob))

breakout_board_2025_filtered <- breakout_board_2025 %>%
  filter(WAR < 3)


ggplot(
  breakout_board_2025_filtered,
  aes(x = Age, y = breakout_prob, color = PA)
) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.7, size = 2) +
  geom_smooth(
    aes(color = NULL),
    method = "loess",
    se = FALSE
  ) +
  scale_color_gradient(
    low = "steelblue",
    high = "darkorange",
    name = "Plate Appearances"
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "2025 Breakout Candidates (Excluding 3+ WAR Seasons)",
    subtitle = "Elastic Net Logistic Model",
    x = "Age",
    y = "Predicted Breakout Probability"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()


candidates <- breakout_board_2025_filtered %>%
  mutate(
    tier = ntile(breakout_prob, 4)
  )

candidates

ggplot(
  candidates,
  aes(x = Age, y = breakout_prob, color = PA)
) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.7, size = 2) +
  geom_smooth(
    aes(color = NULL),
    method = "loess",
    se = FALSE
  ) +
  scale_color_gradient(
    low = "steelblue",
    high = "darkorange",
    name = "Plate Appearances"
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "2025 Breakout Candidates (Excluding 3+ WAR Seasons)",
    subtitle = "Elastic Net Logistic Model",
    x = "Age",
    y = "Predicted Breakout Probability"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

```

```{r}

top_15 <- breakout_board_2025_filtered %>%
  arrange(desc(breakout_prob)) %>%
  slice(1:15) %>%
  select(
    PlayerName,
    Age,
    PA,
    WAR,
    breakout_prob
  )

print(top_15)


```

```{r}

# Extract coefs
coef_df <- coef(logit_enet, s = "lambda.min") %>%
  as.matrix() %>%
  as.data.frame() %>%
  rownames_to_column("variable")

colnames(coef_df)[2] <- "coef"

colnames(coef_df)


player_name <- "Jordan Walker"

player_index <- which(score_2025$PlayerName == player_name)

x_player <- x_2025_mat[player_index, ] %>%
  as.numeric()

names(x_player) <- colnames(x_2025_mat)

player_contrib <- coef_df %>%
  filter(variable != "(Intercept)") %>%
  mutate(
    x_value = x_player[variable],
    contribution = coef * x_value
  ) %>%
  filter(contribution != 0)



player_contrib %>%
  mutate(abs_contribution = abs(contribution)) %>%
  arrange(desc(abs_contribution))

```

```{r}

#jordan walker
j_wal_stats <- read.csv("savant_data.csv")

head(j_wal_stats)
colnames(j_wal_stats)
```

```{r}

# EDA with Jordan Walker
ev_la <- j_wal_stats %>%
  filter(
    !is.na(launch_speed),
    !is.na(launch_angle)
  )

ev_seq <- seq(98, 123, by = 0.1)

barrel_bounds <- tibble(
  launch_speed = ev_seq,
  la_min = case_when(
    launch_speed <= 100 ~ 26 - (launch_speed - 98),
    TRUE ~ 24 - (launch_speed - 100) * (16 / 16)
  ),
  la_max = case_when(
    launch_speed <= 100 ~ 30 + (launch_speed - 98) * 1.5,
    TRUE ~ 33 + (launch_speed - 100) * (17 / 16) 
  )
)

barrel_polygon <- bind_rows(
  barrel_bounds %>% select(launch_angle = la_min, launch_speed),
  barrel_bounds %>% 
    select(launch_angle = la_max, launch_speed) %>% 
    arrange(desc(launch_speed))
)


ggplot(ev_la, aes(x = launch_angle, y = launch_speed)) +

  # Barrel zones
  geom_polygon(
    data = barrel_polygon,
    aes(x = launch_angle, y = launch_speed),
    fill = "orange",
    alpha = 0.12
  ) +

  # EV–LA points
  geom_point(
    aes(color = estimated_woba_using_speedangle),
    alpha = 0.55,
    size = 2
  ) +

  scale_color_viridis_c(
    option = "plasma",
    name = "xwOBA"
  ) +

  labs(
    title = "Exit Velocity vs Launch Angle",
    subtitle = "Barrell Region is Shaded",
    x = "Launch Angle (degrees)",
    y = "Exit Velocity (mph)"
  ) +

  coord_cartesian(
    xlim = c(-20, 70),
    ylim = c(50, 120)
  ) +

  theme_minimal(base_size = 14)


```

```{r}

# Spray chart
spray_data <- j_wal_stats %>%
  filter(
    !is.na(hc_x),
    !is.na(hc_y),
    events %in% c("single", "double", "triple", "home_run")
  )

home_x <- 125
home_y <- 200
r <- 200

ggplot(spray_data, aes(x = hc_x, y = hc_y)) +

  # Hits
  geom_point(
    aes(color = launch_speed),
    alpha = 0.7,
    size = 2
  ) +

  # Outfield arc
  geom_arc(
    aes(
      x0 = 125, y0 = 200,
      r = 200,
      start = pi, end = 2*pi
    ),
    linewidth = 0.6
  ) +

  # Foul lines
  annotate(
    "segment",
    x = home_x, y = home_y,
    xend = home_x - r * cos(pi/4),
    yend = home_y - r * sin(pi/4),
    linewidth = 0.6
  ) +
  annotate(
    "segment",
    x = home_x, y = home_y,
    xend = home_x + r * cos(pi/4),
    yend = home_y - r * sin(pi/4),
    linewidth = 0.6
  ) +


  scale_color_viridis_c(option = "plasma") +
  coord_fixed() +
  scale_y_reverse() +
  theme_void()




```

```{r}

# trying to find statistics that are important.
avg_la <- j_wal_stats %>%
  filter(
    !is.na(launch_angle),
    type == "X"
  ) %>%
  summarise(
    avg_la = mean(launch_angle),
    median_la = median(launch_angle),
    sd_la = sd(launch_angle),
    n_balls = n()
  )

avg_la

# His average launch angle on balls put in play is 10 degrees, which is very low
```

```{r}

zone_perf <- j_wal_stats %>%
  filter(
    zone %in% 1:9,
    !is.na(estimated_woba_using_speedangle),
    !is.na(estimated_slg_using_speedangle),
    !is.na(estimated_ba_using_speedangle)
  ) %>%
  group_by(zone) %>%
  summarise(
    xwOBA = mean(estimated_woba_using_speedangle),
    xBA = mean(estimated_ba_using_speedangle),
    xSLG = mean(estimated_slg_using_speedangle),
    avg_EV = mean(launch_speed, na.rm = TRUE),
    n = n()
  )


zone_coords <- tibble(
  zone = 1:9,
  x = rep(c(-1, 0, 1), times = 3),
  y = rep(c(1, 0, -1), each = 3)
)

zone_plot <- left_join(zone_perf, zone_coords, by = "zone")


xwOBA_Plot <- ggplot(zone_plot, aes(x = x, y = y, fill = xwOBA)) +
  geom_tile(color = "white", linewidth = 1) +

  geom_text(
    aes(label = round(xwOBA, 3)),
    color = "black",
    size = 5,
    fontface = "bold"
  ) +

  scale_fill_gradientn(
    colors = c("blue", "white", "red"),
    limits = c(.250, .6),
    name = "xwOBA"
  ) +

  coord_fixed() +

  labs(
    title = "Expected wOBA by Strike Zone",
    subtitle = "Based on Statcast xwOBA on contact",
    x = NULL,
    y = NULL
  ) +

  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    axis.text = element_blank(),
    panel.grid = element_blank()
  )


xSLG_plot <- ggplot(zone_plot, aes(x = x, y = y, fill = xSLG)) +
  geom_tile(color = "white", linewidth = 1) +

  geom_text(
    aes(label = round(xSLG, 3)),
    color = "black",
    size = 5,
    fontface = "bold"
  ) +

  scale_fill_gradientn(
    colors = c("blue", "white", "red"),
    limits = c(.350, .900),
    name = "xSLG"
  ) +

  coord_fixed() +

  labs(
    title = "Expected SLG by Strike Zone",
    subtitle = "Based on Statcast xSLG on contact",
    x = NULL,
    y = NULL
  ) +

  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    axis.text = element_blank(),
    panel.grid = element_blank()
  )


xBA_plot <- ggplot(zone_plot, aes(x = x, y = y, fill = xBA)) +
  geom_tile(color = "white", linewidth = 1) +

  geom_text(
    aes(label = round(xBA, 3)),
    color = "black",
    size = 5,
    fontface = "bold"
  ) +

  scale_fill_gradientn(
    colors = c("blue", "white", "red"),
    limits = c(.150, .500),
    name = "xBA"
  ) +

  coord_fixed() +

  labs(
    title = "Expected BA by Strike Zone",
    subtitle = "Based on Statcast xBA on contact",
    x = NULL,
    y = NULL
  ) +

  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    axis.text = element_blank(),
    panel.grid = element_blank()
  )


xwOBA_Plot
xSLG_plot
xBA_plot

```
